title: aglaia odorata var. chaudocensis
intro: Aglaia odorata var. chaudocensis, also known as Aglaia chaudocensis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae, native to Vietnam. It is a small tree with aromatic and medicinal properties, traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant's leaves, bark, and fruits are rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing numerous health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and protecting against infections. Aglaia odorata var. chaudocensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to support the immune system and alleviate various health issues.
